extraction.one_line_summary: ROLLAND Pierre attacked with 40km to go on flat-to-descent terrain, caught sleeping peloton looking at each other, soloed to 23-second victory.
tactical_patterns: Rolland attacked precisely when breakaway tactics shifted from climbs to rolling/descending terrain, exploiting hesitation in chase group.
Conti repeatedly attacked to soften group for COSTA Rui, classic domestique pattern that backfired when others stopped responding.
Chase group fatal error: rolled with early Conti attacks instead of controlling, created tactical confusion enabling Rolland's decisive move.

rider_signals.ROLLAND Pierre: positive: transformed from poor descender earlier in stage to winning on downhill-favoring finale, tactical adaptation or recovery
rider_signals.BRUT Pavel: negative: looked white as a sheet and dropped despite being in early break, suggests deeper fatigue issues beyond single-day effort
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: laboring and getting out of shape day after major effort, recovery capacity questioned with high mountains tomorrow
rider_signals.MAHORIC Matej: negative: isolated doing all chase work while team sat on, exhaustion will compromise future stage utility
